title: Redline GUI
description: A red themed minecraft resource pack that turn gui into red.
body:
![Main menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DH67Yc3R/images/949980db6362e39bf6ad1a8dbac57a8bc421d05a.png)

# 🚩 Redline GUI

**Redline GUI** reimagines Minecraft’s interface with a striking red aesthetic, blending modern style with an intense atmosphere that makes your game feel alive.

- Pack version: 1.0


<details>
  <summary>💜 Questions</summary>

---
**💜 How to install?**
> Download this resource pack then put this on your minecraft resource pack folder and enjoy it 🤭
---
**💜 Which version are supported?**
> Currently 1.21.10 - 1.21.9 mainly supported but maybe other versions also supported. I didn't tested out the other versions 🙂
---
**💜 Does it need any requirements?**
> No, there is no requirements 😮
---
**💜 I need help!**
> Here is my discord id `@snowyy173` and you can message me there if you need help 😉
---
</details>
